# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy Workflow

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: ubuntu-latest | windows-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Use Developer Provided Scripts
      uses: actions/setup-git-refs@v2
      with:
        refs: develop,main
      id: dev_scripts

    - name: Checkout Developer Provided Scripts
      uses: actions/checkout@master
      with:
        repository: ${{ github.repository }}/${{ steps.dev_scripts.outputs.develop-ref }} | ${{ github.repository }}/${{ steps.dev_scripts.outputs.main-ref }}
        path: developer-scripts

    - name: Setup .NET Core SDK if on Windows
      uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v1
      if: runsOn == 'windows'

    - name: Install and Configure Necessary Tools
      run: |
        chmod +x developer-scripts/*.sh
        ./developer-scripts/*.sh

    - name: Run Build Scripts
      run: |
        for script in developer-scripts/*.sh; do
          if [ -x "$script" ]; then
            echo "Running: $script"
            bash "$script"
          fi
        done

    - name: Deploy Application
      run: ./deployment.sh  # replace with your deployment command
